info.description: A Metro Card Management System API
info.title: Go Metro API

get.description: Retrieve all users in the system (Admin access required)
Retrieve a specific user by their ID (Admin access required)

put.description: Update a specific user's information (Admin access required)

400.description: Bad request - validation error or email already exists

delete.description: Delete a specific user from the system (Admin access required)

post.description: Authenticate user with username and password

400.description: Bad request - invalid credentials or inactive account

post.description: Register a new user account with username, password, email, and full name

400.description: Bad request - validation error or user already exists

get.description: Retrieve all metro cards in the system

post.description: Create a new metro card with card ID and user ID

400.description: Bad request - validation error or card already exists

get.description: Retrieve a specific card by its card ID (physical card number)
Retrieve all cards with a specific status (active, inactive, blocked)
Retrieve all cards belonging to a specific user
Retrieve a specific card by its database ID

delete.description: Delete a specific card from the system

post.description: Add money to a card's balance
Create a new transaction history record for metro card usage

get.description: Retrieve a specific history record by its ID

400.description: Bad request - validation error or incorrect old password

put.description: Update current user's email and full name

400.description: Bad request - validation error or email already exists

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
